steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What letter does the word 'apple' start with?
Which letter sounds like 'mmm', like in 'moon'?
When counting, which number comes after 5?

steps.title: Anna's Picnic
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. I like apples. I have ten red apples in my bag. The sun is big and bright.

steps.audio_text: Hi! I'm Lily. I have a red ball. My dog loves to chase it in the garden.

questions.question: Where does the dog chase the ball?

steps.prompt: Say: I have a red apple.

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
How many letters are there in the word 'apple'?
Fill in: The cat is ___ the table. (Grammar question)

lessons.title: My Family & My Body
lessons.topic: Family, Body Parts, and Personal Descriptions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who loves to read you bedtime stories?
questions.hint: She tucks you in at night and reads with love.

questions.question_text: What helps you see things far away?
Who makes your favorite pancake breakfast?
questions.hint: She loves baking and giving hugs.

steps.title: My Family
steps.text: This is my family. I have a brother. His name is Max. Max has a big smile and short hair. He likes to play in the park with me.

questions.question: What does Max like to do?

steps.audio_text: My brother has big brown eyes and a friendly smile. He loves to play with his toy car and build tall towers with blocks.

questions.question: What does he like to play with?
What are the color of his eyes?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have a nose and two ears.'
steps.expected_text: i have a nose and two ears

questions.question_text: I ___ a sister. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'brother'? (Vocabulary question)
My mom is ___ the kitchen. (Reading comprehension)
True or False: Your nose helps you smell.
Which part of the body do you use to kick a ball?

lessons.title: Animals & School Review
lessons.topic: Farm/Pets, School Bag, Colors, and Emotions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the cat in the video?
questions.hint: This color is also the color of a carrot.

questions.question_text: Who is carrying a school bag in the video?
questions.hint: This person is small and likes to play.

questions.question_text: How does the dog feel in the video?
questions.hint: The dog is wagging its tail.

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: I am on the farm. I see a brown horse and a yellow chicken. I have a blue school bag. There is an orange in my bag. I like the big red barn!

questions.question: What is in the school bag?

steps.audio_text: The farmer is happy because the sun is shining. In the barn, there are two brown cows eating hay.

questions.question: How many cows are in the barn?

steps.prompt: Say: What animal do you like? (Use 'I like ...')

questions.question_text: I ___ a teacher. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'dog'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Red' is a color.
What do you carry books in?
I __ a book in my bag. (Grammar question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you open with a key?
questions.hint: It's something that keeps things safe.

questions.question_text: What do you use a doorknob for?
questions.hint: You turn it to get inside.

questions.question_text: What can be locked with a key?
questions.hint: It is used to store valuable things.

steps.title: Mia's Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Mia. I have a big yellow ball. I like to play in the park. My ball is on the grass. I have a friend. His name is Tom. We are happy!

questions.question: What is the color of Mia's ball?
Where does Mia like to play?

steps.audio_text: Hello, my name is Max. I have a big brown dog. His name is Bruno, and he loves playing in the park.

questions.question: What is the color of Max's dog?
Where does Bruno like to play?

steps.prompt: Say: Tell me your name, how you feel today, and what toy you like.
steps.expected_text: hello my name is emma i am excited i like my teddy bear

questions.question_text: I ___ a new toy. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'apple'? (Vocabulary question)
Where do rabbits like to eat carrots? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: 'Is' is used with 'he' or 'she'.
Fill in the blank: My friend is ___ happy. (Grammar/Vocabulary)
